## Summary

What should change?

## Motivation

Why is this useful?

## Scope

What is included and what is explicitly out of scope?

## Compatibility

Does this affect the FT1.2-like wire protocol, gRPC contracts, HTTP API, Web UI,
Docker, or CI?
